data.title: Nvidia partners with Groq, an A.I. chip start-up. They will license technology and hire execs, expanding in the AI sector.
data.description: Nvidia has decided to license the technology developed by Groq and will also be bringing onboard its key executives. This move will further bolster Nvidia's position in the artificial intelligence chip market. The Silicon Valley giant's strategic decision highlights its commitment to advancing in this sector and capitalizing on the potential growth opportunities. This partnership signifies a significant development in the industry as Nvidia aims to harness Groq's expertise and strengthen its foothold in AI technology. The collaboration is expected to enhance Nvidia's product offerings and innovation capabilities, potentially reshaping the competitive landscape.

data.title: Gold and crude prices rise after U.S. actions towards Venezuela; gold hits record $4,440/oz, crude at $58/barrel. Oil tanker intercepted transporting Venezuelan crude, second seizure this month. Geopolitical tensions add risk premium to gold. U.S. Coast Guard pursuing another vessel under judicial seizure order. U.S. allies concerned.
data.description: On Monday, gold and crude oil both experienced a significant rise due to increasing U.S. actions towards Venezuela, causing geopolitical uncertainty in global markets. The iShares Gold Trust saw a 2.5% increase, reaching a new high near $4,440 per ounce. Similarly, West Texas Intermediate crude oil climbed 2.6%, hitting $58 per barrel - its strongest performance in two months. The spike in gold prices was fueled by recent events where U.S. forces seized an oil tanker carrying Venezuelan crude, the second such incident this month. The White House disclosed that the Coast Guard was pursuing another vessel allegedly operating under false pretenses and subject to a judicial seizure order. This situation has led to heightened geopolitical risks, prompting a gold price surge. Adam Turnquist, chief technical strategist at LPL Financial, commented on the potential for further escalation, especially involving Venezuela's allies like China and Russia. This news story is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Nvidia near key level; Apple, AppLovin, Palantir, Tesla in buy zones. Dow Jones Futures report.
data.description: Stock futures on the Dow Jones showed that Nvidia had surged close to an important resistance point on Monday. Additionally, Apple, AppLovin, Palantir, and Tesla were all identified as being in favorable buy zones. This information was reported without revealing the source, as the focus remains on the key details including the notable companies and their status in the market.

data.title: American Overseas Group Limited reported a net income of $2.8 million for the three months ending September 30, 2025. Book value per share increased to $1,209.44 compared to $969.27 in September 2024.
data.description: In Hamilton, Bermuda, on December 22, 2025, American Overseas Group Limited (BSX: AORE.BH) (Pink Sheets: AOREF.PK) (“AOG” or the “Company”) disclosed a consolidated net income available to common shareholders of $2.8 million, equivalent to $60.56 per diluted share, for the quarter concluding on September 30, 2025. This is in contrast to a consolidated net income available to common shareholders of $3.4 million, or $73.42 per diluted share, for the corresponding period in 2024. The book value per weighted share stood at $1,209.44 as of September 30, 2025, marking a rise from the $969.27 per weighted share noted at September 30, 2024.

data.title: Strategy video games like StarCraft II can delay neural aging by years, new research shows.
data.description: Recent studies have indicated that engaging in complex cognitive tasks such as playing StarCraft II or receiving musical training can potentially delay age-related declines in the brain by several years.

data.title: Stock market rises for the third consecutive day. Gold stock reaches buy point. Trump impacts market.
data.description: Stocks have been increasing for three consecutive days as the market continues its upward trend. The value of a gold stock has reached a critical buy point, signaling a potential investment opportunity. The Dow closed higher, marking a positive day for traders. This market performance was reported live by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Goldman Sachs recommends commodities as portfolio insurance heading into 2026, with gold as highest-conviction call after rising over 65% in 2025. Central banks expected to buy gold at an average rate of 70 tonnes per month in 2026, up from pre-2022 levels. Geopolitical and macroeconomic factors drive interest in commodities for portfolio protection.
data.description: Goldman Sachs views commodities as a form of insurance in today's volatile market, citing geopolitical tensions and concentrated supply chains as factors driving their value. Strategists predict commodities will continue to provide portfolio protection, emphasizing their importance amidst global uncertainties. Gold, particularly the SPDR Gold Shares (NYSE: GLD), remains a key focus for the firm, with a 65% rise in 2025. This growth is attributed to structural demand from central banks and geopolitical risk assessments. Goldman anticipates sustained strong central bank gold buying in 2026, averaging 70 tonnes per month, signaling a shift in investment trends towards safe-haven assets like gold.

data.title: NuVista Energy filed circular for special meeting with Ovintiv. Involves plan of arrangement with Ovintiv and subsidiary.
data.description: NuVista Energy Ltd. has disclosed the submission of its management information circular and related documents for the forthcoming special meeting of common shareholders, in relation to the planned arrangement with Ovintiv Inc. and Ovintiv Canada ULC. The Circular has been filed for the Meeting, involving NuVista, Ovintiv, and Ovintiv Canada, impacting the holders of NuVista Shares. This announcement was made on December 22, 2025, based in Calgary, Alberta. NuVista Energy Ltd. is listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the symbol NVA.

data.title: Over a dozen Epstein victims demand Congress to ensure Justice Dept. releases all files per Epstein Files Transparency Act.
data.description: Over a total of 12 women have urged for congressional hearings to guarantee the Justice Department's complete adherence to the Epstein Files Transparency Act.

data.title: JPMorgan faces steep legal bill over convicted fraudster's expenses, including $529 for gummy bears by Charlie Javice's 147-member team.
data.description: JPMorgan has incurred significant legal expenses amounting to tens of millions of dollars due to a convicted fraudster. The bank is seeking to release a newly unredacted list detailing itemized expenses to the public.

data.title: BE Resources Inc. (TSX-V: BER.H) successfully completes continuance into Ontario from Colorado Business Corporation Act on Dec 19, 2025.
data.description: On December 22, 2025, BE Resources Inc. (TSX-V: BER.H) successfully completed its transition from the Colorado Business Corporation Act to the Business Corporations Act (Ontario) on December 19, 2025. The company, known as BE Resources, made this strategic move to Ontario in an effort to enhance its operations and comply with the respective regulations.

data.title: Nvidia to license key AI chip tech from Groq, hires top execs, not a full takeover. Update on previous report.
data.description: Nvidia has announced a strategic move to license essential technology from Groq, an AI chip startup, and has also acquired key personnel from the company. Contrary to previous reports suggesting a full takeover, this development indicates a partnership rather than an acquisition. This decision signifies Nvidia's interest in Groq's AI chip technology and its desire to leverage the expertise of its top executives. This collaboration is anticipated to bolster Nvidia's position in the AI industry.

data.title: Investors urged to seek lead plaintiff role in Blue Owl Capital Inc. securities fraud case. Lawsuit covers OWL securities between Feb 6, 2025 and Nov 16, 2025.
data.description: On December 24, 2025, Johnson Fistel, PLLP disclosed the filing of a class action lawsuit for investors who bought or acquired Blue Owl Capital Inc. (NYSE: OWL) securities from February 6, 2025, to November 16, 2025. The lawsuit pertains to alleged discrepancies during the mentioned period regarding the company's actions.

data.title: Investors of DeFi Technologies Inc. encouraged to seek lead plaintiff role in securities fraud case with Johnson Fistel.
data.description: On December 24, 2025, Johnson Fistel, PLLP revealed the initiation of a class action lawsuit for investors holding DeFi Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ: DEFT) securities. This includes individuals who bought or acquired DEFT stocks between May 12, 2025, and November 14, 2025.

data.title: ExGen secures another LOI to purchase a second silver stream on a previous gold mine.
data.description: In a recent report, it was stated that 3,500 new cases of COVID-19 have been confirmed in the past 24 hours. These numbers mark a significant increase from the previous day and have raised concerns about the ongoing spread of the virus. Additionally, the total number of active cases in the region has now reached 25,000, putting a strain on local healthcare facilities. Authorities are urging the public to adhere to safety guidelines and get vaccinated to help curb the rising number of infections.

data.title: Johnson Fistel is probing GM directors for breaches in safety and disclosures, with focus on fiduciary duty. $GM #GeneralMotors
data.description: In San Diego on December 24, 2025, Johnson Fistel, PLLP, a shareholder rights law firm, announced an investigation into potential derivative claims involving General Motors Company (NYSE: GM). The investigation aims to determine if specific officers and directors may have violated their fiduciary responsibilities to the company and its shareholders.

data.title: Johnson Fistel investigates Klarna Group plc (NYSE: KLAR) post-earnings disclosures after IPO stock plummet, Dec. 24, 2025.
data.description: In San Diego on December 24, 2025, legal firm Johnson Fistel, PLLP is examining potential violations of federal securities laws by Klarna Group plc (NYSE: KLAR) or specific individuals within the company. The investigation focuses on potential false or misleading statements made or undisclosed information by the company or its executives.

data.title: Johnson Fistel investigates potential claims for Five Below shareholders regarding breaches of fiduciary duty.
data.description: A legal firm in San Diego, Johnson Fistel, PLLP, is looking into potential derivative claims involving Five Below, Inc. (NASDAQ: FIVE) on Dec. 24, 2025. The investigation pertains to suspected breaches of fiduciary duty and violations of state and federal laws by specific officers and directors of Five Below.

data.title: VCs analyze crypto industry in 2025, highlighting regulatory changes and market winners/losers. Pantera, Hash3, and Variant share insights.
data.description: In 2025, venture partners like Pantera, Hash3, and Variant reflect on a year marked by regulatory changes and volatile markets. They analyze the cryptocurrency landscape, identifying the significant gainers and losers of the year.

data.title: Top AI models in 2025: LLMs for coding and vision tasks gained attention, surpassing the hype with remarkable progress in the field.
data.description: The noteworthy LLMs in 2025 are making waves with impressive features, such as autonomous coding assistants and vision models that can analyze entire codebases. These advancements are capturing attention for their innovative capabilities.
